chunks.text: Camp Fee | Berkeley Girls In Engineering Berkeley Girls in Engineering 2018 Camp Fee Our camp fee system is as follows: Families who demonstrate financial need: FREE Families who do not demonstrate financial need: $600 Financial need is demonstrated

nancial need: $600 Financial need is demonstrated by qualifying for one of the following programs: Free or reduced price lunch at school CalFresh Medi-Cal If your family demonstrates financial need, you do not need to submit an additional scholarship

ou do not need to submit an additional scholarship application. You only need to indicate your financial need when responding to the camp fee question in the application. However, Girls in Engineering reserves the right to request financial need docu

reserves the right to request financial need documentation during the application review process. If your family cannot afford camp, but does not qualify for one of the programs listed above, you may e‑mail gie@berkeley.edu to request that we review

e‑mail gie@berkeley.edu to request that we review your specific situation. You can contact us at any time—your daughter does not need to submit an application first. All scholarship decisions will be based on financial need. If we are able to identi

based on financial need. If we are able to identify an assistance program that your family qualifies for, your daughter will be eligible for a full scholarship. (Unfortunately, we are not able to offer partial scholarships at this time.) Information

er partial scholarships at this time.) Information for families that do not demonstrate financial need Admissions decisions will be e-mailed to parents by April 16. When is tuition due? The non-refundable tuition deposit ($100) is due by May 1 . When

able tuition deposit ($100) is due by May 1 . When is the remaining tuition due? The balance of the tuition ($500) is due by May 19 . Will I receive a refund if my daughter withdraws from camp? The refund level is determined by when your daughter wit

fund level is determined by when your daughter withdraws: May 19 - If written notice of withdrawal from GiE is received by May 19, your payment will be refunded, minus the $100 deposit. June 1st - If written notice of withdrawal from GiE is received

written notice of withdrawal from GiE is received before June 1st, you will receive a $300 refund. June 9th - If written notice of withdrawal from GiE is received before June 9th, you will receive a $150 refund. After this date, no refund will be off
150 refund. After this date, no refund will be offered. Volunteers Camp is free for our high school volunteers.
